title: Fused entropy from logits — streaming vocab kernel (any size + BF16)

results.note: Streaming single-pass kernel using online logsumexp trick. Old kernel was capped at V<=4096; new kernel handles any vocab size and BF16. Also upgraded compute_entropy_loss in future_kl.py to use this kernel — removes dtype restriction and enables all 4 agg modes for Triton path.
